title: Job Readiness Workshop Plan
text:
## Job Readiness Workshop Plan

**Topic:** How to sound {adjective} while answering {number} interview questions.

**Warm-up:** Everyone says their name, dream {job}, and one {adjective} strength.

**Activity:** Practice {verb ending in -ing} a handshake, then explain why you want to {verb} at a {place}.

**Materials:** {color} folders, resume {plural noun}, one emergency {object}, and {food} for morale.

**Employment specialist note:** If anyone gets {emotion}, pause {adverb} and try a {silly word} confidence chant.

**Homework:** Wear a {clothing item} on {day of week}.
